ValidationRule.description: Term dates cannot Exceed the period of the student Visa or the proof of study times
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR(IP_FirstRecordedTermDate__c > IP_Term1StartDate__c , IP_FirstRecordedTermDate__c > IP_Term2StartDate__c , IP_FirstRecordedTermDate__c > IP_Term3StartDate__c , IP_LastRecordedTermdate__c < IP_Term1EndDate__c , IP_LastRecordedTermdate__c < IP_Term2EndDate__c , IP_LastRecordedTermdate__c < IP_Term3EndDate__c , IP_Term1EndDate__c > IP_EarliestExpiringComplianceDate__c, IP_Term2EndDate__c > IP_EarliestExpiringComplianceDate__c, IP_Term3EndDate__c > IP_EarliestExpiringComplianceDate__c, AND(OR(IP_Term1StartDate__c > DATE(1,1,1),IP_Term2StartDate__c > DATE(1,1,1),IP_Term3StartDate__c > DATE(1,1,1)), ISBLANK(IP_FirstRecordedTermDate__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Term dates cannot Exceed the period of the student Visa or the proof of study times
